title: aegilops crassa var. crassa
intro: Aegilops crassa var. crassa, also known as 'Aegilops crassa' or 'wild goat grass', is a type of wild grass native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops crassa var. crassa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
